media.title: Labaron Philon Jr. believes adaptability is one of his ‘biggest traits.’ Applying that with the Sixers begins now.
media.description: Philon joins a Sixers guard group already featuring All-NBA third-team selection Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, who finished third in voting for the NBA's Rookie of the Year.
